CVE-2019-11938.title: Java Facebook Thrift servers would not error upon receiving messa ...
CVE-2019-11938.summary: Java Facebook Thrift servers would not error upon receiving messages declaring containers of sizes larger than the payload. As a result, malicious clients could send short messages which would result in a large memory allocation, potentially leading to denial of service. This issue affects Facebook Thrift prior to v2019.12.09.00.

CVE-2019-11939.title: Golang Facebook Thrift servers would not error upon receiving mes ...
CVE-2019-11939.summary: Golang Facebook Thrift servers would not error upon receiving messages declaring containers of sizes larger than the payload. As a result, malicious clients could send short messages which would result in a large memory allocation, potentially leading to denial of service. This issue affects Facebook Thrift prior to v2020.03.16.00.

CVE-2019-3552.title: C++ Facebook Thrift servers (using cpp2) would not error upon rec ...
CVE-2019-3552.summary: C++ Facebook Thrift servers (using cpp2) would not error upon receiving messages with containers of fields of unknown type. As a result, malicious clients could send short messages which would take a long time for the server to parse, potentially leading to denial of service. This issue affects Facebook Thrift prior to v2019.02.18.00.

CVE-2021-24028.title: An invalid free in Thrift's table-based serialization can cause t ...
CVE-2021-24028.summary: An invalid free in Thrift's table-based serialization can cause the application to crash or potentially result in code execution or other undesirable effects. This issue affects Facebook Thrift prior to v2021.02.22.00.
